states.name: declared
states.description: Session identity/scope exists but no active attachment or runtime binding is required.
entry_requirements: Workspace, session kind, policy and authority are recorded.

states.name: active
states.description: Session may accept authorized attachments; this does not imply every specialist runtime is ready.
entry_requirements: Session policy and any required Materialization binding are valid.

states.name: detached
states.description: No current attachment is active while the Session may remain resumable/persistent.
entry_requirements: Attachment closure/expiry is recorded; Session persistence policy is retained.

states.name: suspended
states.description: New attachments/actions are blocked temporarily without retiring Session identity.
entry_requirements: Suspension authority and treatment of active attachments/leases are recorded.

states.name: closing
entry_requirements: Close Activity and cleanup expectations are recorded.

states.name: closed
states.description: Session is closed and cannot accept new attachments; history remains.
entry_requirements: Attachments, control references and specialist Session bindings are reconciled.

states.name: expired
states.description: Session ended because its policy lifetime expired.
entry_requirements: Expiry time/policy and cleanup evidence are retained.

states.name: revoked
entry_requirements: Revocation authority and affected attachments/leases are retained.

required_preconditions: Workspace and policy scope are valid.
Authority is current and required Materialization/specialist Session binding exists where applicable.
No active attachment remains and persistence policy allows Session retention.
New attachments/actions are blocked and active authority is reconciled.
Close Activity and cleanup policy are recorded.
Attachments, leases and specialist bindings are closed/reconciled.
Recorded expiry has passed and cleanup policy is applied.
Revocation scope and affected attachments/leases are identified/fenced.
